data.title: JDM TOUR website opens, offering premium car tours in Tokyo, highlighting Japanese sports cars for global fans. Website: https://jdmtour.com/
data.description: Tokyo-based JDM TOUR has launched its website, offering a premium car tour service showcasing iconic Japanese sports cars in the vibrant streets of Tokyo. The site, now live at jdmtour.com, caters to worldwide car enthusiasts seeking cultural immersion and convenient booking. The rise in popularity of Japanese sports cars is attributed to the impact of platforms like YouTube, Instagram, and the Fast & Furious franchise, leading to a cult following. JDM TOUR provides a unique experience for enthusiasts, bringing them closer to the legendary cars that have become global icons.

data.title: PracticeQ Engage tackles no-shows with automated reminders and messaging to optimize patient communication.
data.description: A new platform called PracticeQ Engage has been introduced in San Diego to address the issue of patient no-shows in clinics by providing automated reminders. This platform aims to help clinics recover lost revenue and ensure smoother operations through enhanced patient communication.

data.title: Affirm applies to establish industrial loan company, submitting applications to Nevada Financial Institutions Division and FDIC.
data.description: In San Francisco, Affirm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AFRM) revealed its move to seek approval from the Nevada Financial Institutions Division and the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) to establish Affirm Bank. The proposed Nevada-chartered industrial loan company would provide Affirm with the ability to expand responsibly, leveraging the safety net of an FDIC-insured institution. This strategic step is geared towards broadening access to transparent financial services, reflecting Affirm's commitment to growth and stability in the market.

data.title: Western Union (NYSE: WU) to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 20, 2026 at 8:30am ET, with CEO and CFO hosting webcast and call.
data.description: In Denver, the Western Union Company (NYSE: WU) revealed that CEO, Devin McGranahan, and CFO, Matt Cagwin, will lead a webcast and conference call to review the fourth quarter and full year 2025 outcomes on February 20, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The financial results will be circulated in a press release before the call. The webcast and presentation can be accessed at https://ir.westernunion.com. A replay of the webcast will also be made available.

data.title: GlobalData predicts auto industry sales to reach 100 million units by January 2026 according to J.D. Power.
data.description: In the latest report, it has been stated that the number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has surpassed 10 million worldwide, with the death toll reaching over 500,000. The United States remains the most affected country with over 2.5 million cases and more than 125,000 deaths. Brazil, Russia, India, and the United Kingdom also have significant numbers of cases. Experts are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines to prevent further spread of the virus. Vaccines are currently in development, with hopes of a viable solution in the near future. The global economy has been severely impacted by the pandemic, with unemployment rates rising and businesses struggling to recover. The situation is constantly evolving, and governments around the world are working to address the challenges posed by the ongoing crisis.

data.title: Dynatrace named Customers' Choice in 2025 Gartner Peer Insights for Observability Platforms, excelling in user interest and adoption.
data.description: Boston-based company Dynatrace, listed on the NYSE under the symbol DT, has been awarded a Customers’ Choice recognition in the Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Observability Platforms report for 2025. This prestigious honor is given to vendors who surpass the market average in User Interest and Adoption, as well as Overall Experience. Notably, Dynatrace has met or exceeded these criteria. The report, issued by Gartner, provides valuable insights and can be accessed for free. Gartner's Voice of the Customer report is known for synthesizing significant data regarding customer feedback in the industry.

data.title: Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF (CBOE: MINN) to pay distributions to unitholders for Q1 2026.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, the Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF (CBOE: MINN) shared that it will be issuing distributions for the first quarter of 2026. These payments are set to be distributed to unitholders of the Middlefield Innovation Dividend ETF.

data.title: Pizza Hut hosted a unique Supper Club with acclaimed chef and 8 culinary experts in Dubai to showcase its high-quality ingredients.
data.description: Pizza Hut in Dubai, UAE, recently showcased the excellence of its ingredients by hosting a unique fine-dining event. The renowned brand invited an esteemed chef and 8 culinary experts to sample their pizzas. This event, held on January 23, 2026, aimed to highlight the superior quality of the ingredients used by Pizza Hut. The surprising experience aimed to challenge any doubts about the ingredients in Pizza Hut pizzas.

data.title: Authentic Brands Group acquires 51% of Guess? intellectual property, making it private; Guess? shareholders involved in transaction.
data.description: In a recent joint statement, Authentic Brands Group (Authentic) and Guess?, Inc. (NYSE: GES) revealed the successful completion of the acquisition deal to privatize Guess?. Authentic has obtained majority ownership, holding a 51% stake in virtually all Guess? intellectual property. Among the existing Guess? stakeholders involved in the agreement are Maurice Marciano, Paul Marciano, Nicolai Marciano, and Carlos Alberini, along with specific trusts, foundations, and affiliates associated with them, collectively referred to as the “R."

data.title: Coating Place appoints new leaders; industry leader in fluid bed tech for 50 years.
data.description: Verona, Wisconsin -  Jan. 23, 2026 - Coating Place marks its 50th anniversary, maintaining its position as the top company in Wurster-based fluid bed technology for controlled release and taste masking applications. With decades of experience in the field, the company has established a strong reputation in the industry.

data.title: Andesite is becoming FedRAMP High authorized, enhancing public sector security with their Human-AI SOC.
data.description: Andesite, a Human-AI SOC company, has made significant progress towards obtaining FedRAMP Authorization and is currently accessible in the federal marketplace. According to an announcement made on Jan. 23, 2026, in McLean, VA, Andesite has successfully met the stringent requirements of the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP) High level. This achievement signals a major milestone for Andesite as it positions itself to cater to federal agencies' cybersecurity needs.

data.title: For All Mothers+ Grants empower 5 Team USA moms to bring babies to 2026 Winter Olympics, offsetting expenses.
data.description: A nonprofit called For all Mothers+ has teamed up with Joie to help Team USA moms cover expensive costs, allowing them to focus on motherhood while competing globally. The organization is based in Morgantown, PA and the partnership was announced on January 23, 2026. This initiative aims to support mothers who are part of Team USA by providing financial assistance.

data.title: La Rosa Holdings sees $79M revenue in FY2025, 14% YoY growth. CEO emphasizes move to organic expansion, cost control, AI.
data.description: The CEO has emphasized a move away from growth through acquisitions towards focusing on organic expansion, maintaining cost discipline, and investing in AI infrastructure initiatives. This strategic shift aims to drive long-term value for the company. By transitioning to this approach, the company aims to leverage its resources effectively and foster sustainable growth. This shift reflects a broader industry trend towards prioritizing organic growth over rapid expansion through acquisitions. The company plans to allocate significant resources to develop its AI infrastructure, enhancing its technological capabilities for future competitiveness in the market. This shift in strategy is essential for the company's long-term success and aims to position it as a leader in its sector.

data.title: Ulta Beauty expanding into UAE via partnership with Alshaya Group, with debut at Mall of the Emirates on Jan 29, 2026.
data.description: Ulta Beauty, the leading specialty beauty retailer in the US, is preparing to launch its first store in the United Arab Emirates at Mall of the Emirates on January 29, 2026. This expansion is in collaboration with Alshaya Group, a prominent international retail franchise operator. This move signifies a significant step in Ulta Beauty’s global growth, following the inauguration of its initial store in Kuwait on November 7, 2025. The brand's entry into the UAE market showcases its commitment to international expansion and strategic partnerships.

data.title: Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF to distribute Q1 2026 payments to unitholders, as per TSX: MREL.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, Middlefield Real Estate Dividend ETF (TSX: MREL) shared that distributions for Q1 2026 will be paid to unitholders. The Fund is delighted to announce the upcoming distributions for the quarter.

data.title: New Business4Land Champions’ Council launched at Davos to drive private sector action on land and drought crisis.
data.description: A new initiative, the Business4Land Champions’ Council, has been launched in Davos, Switzerland, aimed at mobilizing the private sector to address land degradation and drought issues. The council aims to drive action on sustainable land management and combatting drought. This initiative brings together influential business leaders to leverage their resources and expertise to tackle these pressing environmental challenges. The council's key focus areas include promoting sustainable land practices, restoring degraded land, and implementing drought resilience measures. The launch of this council signifies a significant step towards engaging the private sector in addressing land and drought issues on a global scale.

data.title: US braces for historic cold wave, causing natural gas prices to surge over 60% to $5 per MMBtu, largest gain since 1990. President Trump vows to halve energy prices if re-elected. Severe storm warnings issued.
data.description: Natural gas prices are set for a historic surge this week due to high heating demand and severe cold weather across the U.S. The UNG ETF has seen a significant rally. Futures at the Henry Hub facility spiked above $5 per MMBtu on Friday, marking a 60% increase for the week - the largest jump since gas trading began in 1990. With forecasts predicting extreme cold, heavy snow, and icy conditions in 40 states, President Trump expressed concern over the rare cold wave. Campaigning for the 2024 election, Trump promised to halve U.S. energy prices in a year if elected. The National Weather Service issued warnings about the storm's severity, with heavy snow expected in the Central and Southern Plains to the Ohio Valley. This news and more can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: NYC orthopedic surgeon Dr. Steven Struhl named 2026 Top Patient Rated Doctor with 150+ five-star reviews and 40+ years of experience.
data.description: Dr. Steven Struhl, a leading orthopedic specialist in New York City and Westchester, has garnered over 150 five-star reviews and boasts over 40 years of experience in treating intricate shoulder and knee injuries. Setting the benchmark for patient-focused care, Dr. Struhl showcases exceptional expertise in orthopedics. The announcement was made on January 23, 2026.
China and Russia hold negotiations on Asia-Pacific issues

data.title: CANEUS International partners with Maharashtra province at WEF Davos to establish global innovation institute.
data.description: In a significant development, an announcement was made in DAVOS, Switzerland on January 23, 2026 regarding the establishment of the world's pioneering Global Mid-TRL Innovation Acceleration and Skilling Institute. This institute is designed to focus on aerospace, space, energy, and deep technology sectors. The groundbreaking initiative is a collaboration between CANEUS International and the Government of Maharashtra, India. This initiative aims to bolster innovation and skills development in these key industries.
